_meta.note: First real regression pins for the deterministic prose-review pipeline. Editorial/prose metrics (word/sentence counts, readability, citation resolution) re-derived from the committed manuscript via infrastructure.prose.analyze_manuscript + src.prose_facade.parse_bib_keys — NOT read from the stale output/ artifacts (which predate a references.bib edit and reported bib_count=7 / 1 unused; the committed source is bib_count=6 / 0 unused).

abstract_files_analysed.reason: Number of manuscript markdown files analysed by analyze_manuscript over the committed manuscript/ tree; substituted into the abstract Run snapshot as {{FILES_ANALYSED}}.
abstract_files_analysed.script: PYTHONPATH=projects/templates/template_prose_project:projects/templates/template_prose_project/src:. uv run python -c 'from infrastructure.prose import analyze_manuscript; from src.config import load_project_config; from src.manuscript_variables import compute_variables; c=load_project_config("projects/templates/template_prose_project/manuscript/config.yaml"); r=analyze_manuscript("projects/templates/template_prose_project/manuscript", long_sentence_threshold=c.prose.long_sentence_threshold); print(compute_variables(config_title=c.title, manuscript_report=r.to_dict()).files_analysed)'

abstract_total_words.reason: Total word count aggregated across the committed manuscript by analyze_manuscript; substituted into the abstract Run snapshot as {{TOTAL_WORDS}} and used as the citation-density check denominator.
abstract_total_words.script: same analyze_manuscript + compute_variables call as abstract_files_analysed; field .total_words

abstract_total_sentences.reason: Total sentence count aggregated across the committed manuscript by analyze_manuscript; substituted into the abstract Run snapshot as {{TOTAL_SENTENCES}}.
abstract_total_sentences.script: same analyze_manuscript + compute_variables call as abstract_files_analysed; field .total_sentences

abstract_avg_grade_level.reason: Weighted-average Flesch-Kincaid grade level over the committed manuscript; substituted into the abstract Run snapshot as {{AVG_GRADE_LEVEL}} and gated by the grade_level_in_band check (target band 10.0-18.0).
abstract_avg_grade_level.script: same analyze_manuscript + compute_variables call as abstract_files_analysed; field .avg_grade_level

abstract_citation_count.reason: Number of unique in-prose citation keys extracted by analyze_manuscript; substituted into the abstract Run snapshot as {{CITATION_COUNT}} and cross-checked against references.bib by the bibliography_consistency check.
abstract_citation_count.script: same analyze_manuscript + compute_variables call as abstract_files_analysed; field .citation_count

bibliography_unused_entries.reason: Count of BibTeX entries present in the committed references.bib but never cited in the prose. The Results section claims every cited key resolves and (with the bundled config) the run is green; the committed source has 6 cited / 6 in bib / 0 missing / 0 unused. Re-derived via src.prose_facade.parse_bib_keys set-difference against analyze_manuscript citation_keys. NOTE: the stale output/checks.json reports bib_count=7 / 1 unused ('Hand-curated') from a superseded parser run — the pin binds the committed source, not the stale artifact.
bibliography_unused_entries.script: PYTHONPATH=projects/templates/template_prose_project:projects/templates/template_prose_project/src:. uv run python -c 'from infrastructure.prose import analyze_manuscript; from src.config import load_project_config; from src.prose_facade import parse_bib_keys; from pathlib import Path; c=load_project_config("projects/templates/template_prose_project/manuscript/config.yaml"); md=Path("projects/templates/template_prose_project/manuscript"); r=analyze_manuscript(md, long_sentence_threshold=c.prose.long_sentence_threshold); bib=parse_bib_keys(md/"references.bib"); print(len(sorted(bib - set(r.citation_keys))))'

abstract_citation_count.claim_text: ... the manuscript references {{CITATION_COUNT}} unique citation key(s); ...

bibliography_unused_entries.claim_text: every [@key] in the prose resolves against manuscript/references.bib (bundled config run is green: 6 cited / 6 in bib / 0 missing / 0 unused).
